designBrief.silhouette: small, slim, nose-forward dart shape — must read as fast and light
designBrief.palette: deep moss-metal with green/teal emissive conduits
designBrief.rtsReadabilityNotes: Must stay readable from an isometric RTS camera at distance; no noisy micro-detail that shimmers; faction accent visible but not overwhelming; no text.

promptCandidates: Stylized seamless sci-fi military vehicle hull texture sheet for a green faction fast recon skimmer in an alien RTS. Material: alien composite shell, grown-metal surfaces. Palette: deep moss-metal with green/teal emissive conduits, with a subtle low-contrast camouflage pattern in the faction hue. Rich surface detail: riveted armor plates, weld seams, maintenance hatches and access panels, air intakes and cooling grilles, stowed spare parts (track links, tool boxes), strapped-down reserve fuel canisters, scuffed edges and oil stains. Alien design language: semi-organic, flowing conduits, chitinous panels, grav skirt glow. Faction markings as abstract glyphs and small stencil icons. Forbidden: heavy armor plates, large turret. Must stay readable from an isometric RTS camera at distance; no noisy micro-detail that shimmers; faction accent visible but not overwhelming; no text.

A seamless, high-resolution texture for the hull of a green fast recon skimmer, showcasing a deep moss-metal primary material that fuses an alien composite shell with intricate, grown-metal surfaces. The design features a delicate network of luminous green and teal emissive conduits flowing organically across the surface, providing subtle internal glow. Incorporate imaginative alien industrial surface details, such as finely integrated bio-tech vents, intricate hexagonal paneling that transitions into smooth, organic curves, and microscopic crystalline formations embedded within the metallic grain. The texture must be presented in a flat orthographic texture-sheet style, completely devoid of perspective, baked lighting, shadows, or any textual elements, ensuring perfect tileability for game assets.

Generate a perfectly tileable, flat orthographic texture sheet depicting the hull surface of a sci-fi green fast recon skimmer. The primary material is a deep moss-metal alien composite, characterized by its visibly grown-metal surfaces that ripple with subtle, organic textures. A complex network of brilliant green and teal emissive conduits are integrated throughout the material, suggesting an internal energy matrix just beneath the surface. Detail the hull with imaginative alien industrial features, including segmented armor plates that flow into biological-looking junctions, embedded energy receptors with faint internal glows, and patterns of intricate, almost hieroglyphic alien circuitry that are an inherent part of the grown-metal formation. The output must be free of any perspective distortion, pre-baked lighting, shadows, or textual overlays, designed purely as a seamless material texture.

notes: Gameplay stats are defined in src/data/unitClasses.ts and were not touched.
